title: Vanilla II: The Journey
description: Go on an Amazing Journey in a Familiar World. A Modpack for Everyone! MC 1.21.1
body:
# Welcome to Your Journey
![Hook image explaining some key features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb832cda880347cfb084e0df71e02080899493bc_0.webp)
Please Install: [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-fabric/download/6371006) - [FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-fabric/download/6119436) - [FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-fabric/download/6304124) - [FTB Filter System](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-filter-system/download/6259287) - [FTB Mod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/download/6259291)

[Installation Guide](https://github.com/EyeOfTheEagle/vanilla2/wiki/Modrinth-Installation-Guide)
_These mods need to be installed from CurseForge for the full experience, since they aren't available on Modrinth due to copyright. Sorry for the Inconvenience!_
# Main Features
### General
- A Familliar Yet Overhauled World
- Custom Gear Tiering System
- Easy to Understand with Advanced Concepts
- Fleshed Out Quest Lines to Guide You
- Focus on Integration and Compatibility
- Extensive and Integrated Lore
### Adventure 🌎
- New & Overhauled Biomes
- Explore 2 New Dimensions
- Enhanced Nether & End Dimension
- Many New Structures & Overhauled Structures
- Custom Journey to the End
- Unique Loot found only by Exploring
### Combat ⚔️
- Overhauled Combat Mechanics
- 14 New Bosses
- Unique Classes
- New Unique Equipment
### Magic 🔮
- Expanded Enchanting System
- New Brewing Mechanics
- Spell Casting
- Rituals
### Farming 🌾
- Seasons
- Enhanced Food Cooking
- New Crops
- Different Food Types
### Tech 🛠️
- More Redstone Components
- New Machines
- Alloying Forges
### Other Features
- Easy Multiplayer
- Many Quality of Life Features
- Enhanced Visuals
- Many New Decorational Blocks
- Balance Changes
- Custom GUI
- End Game Challenges

# Archived
_Please note that this project has been archived. This project will no longer receive updates or bug fixes_

## ~~Roadmap~~
These are things I have planned for the modpack in order of priority. To follow its development and a full roadmap [Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/X6TAsTz8NQ).

- Continuous polishing and general improvements
- Improving the quest lines
- More tech related mechanics
- More brewing mechanics
# Support
- [Report Issues](https://github.com/EyeOfTheEagle/vanilla2/issues)
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/X6TAsTz8NQ)
# Credits
- The amazing mod creators that make this modpack possible
- [Prominece II RPG](https://modrinth.com/modpack/prominence-2-fabric) and [Integrated MC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/integrated-minecraft) for inspiring me
- [Forg (cleannrooster)](https://modrinth.com/user/cleannrooster) for creating a compatibility pack for Better Combat x Serious Player Animations
